title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.029 - Felony conviction not a bar to licensure, when
text:
324.029.  Felony conviction not a bar to licensure, when. — Except as otherwise specifically provided by law, no license for any occupation or profession shall be denied solely on the grounds that an applicant has been previously convicted of a felony.
(L. 2008 S.B. 788)
